content.speakerText: Alright, better get going—don’t wanna be late for the meeting.

options.text: Same here! Good luck with the deck!
I'm sorry, I didn't catch that.
Can you wait a minute? I need to finish this email.
Why are you in such a hurry?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here! Good luck with the deck!' 是对对方道别时的自然回应，既表示共鸣又给予鼓励。其他选项要么表示没听清（不适用于已清楚理解的语境），要么拖延时间或质疑对方，不符合礼貌道别场景。

content.speakerText: I’ve got to head to my next call now.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得去开下一个电话会议了。

options.text: I don’t think that’s a good idea.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Okay, talk to you tomorrow!' 是礼貌、简洁且积极的道别方式，符合职场语境。其他选项试图干预对方安排或追问细节，违背了‘自然结束对话’的场景目的。

content.speakerText: Well, I should get back to my tasks.

options.text: Are you done with your work yet?
Let me help you with that.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here—thanks for the chat!' 表达了共鸣与感谢，自然结束对话。其他选项要么提问干扰，要么提出建议，偏离了‘礼貌道别’的核心目标。

content.template: Alright, better get going—___ wanna be late for the meeting.
content.hint: 口语中常用缩略形式表达否��意愿
content.knowledgePoint: 口语中 don't wanna 的固定搭配

content.template: I’ve got to head out—___ you later!
content.hint: 这是英语中非常常见的非正式道别表达

content.template: Same here! ___ luck with your presentation!
content.hint: 表达祝愿时的常用搭配

content.speakerText: Alright, better get going—don’t wanna be late for the meeting.
expectedAnswers: Same here! Good luck with the deck!
Yeah, go for it—I’ll see you at lunch!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然结束对话而不延长或转移话题
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的口语表达
表达自然度：是否符合职场非正式但礼貌的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'good luck', 'catch you', 'see you' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve got to head to my next call now.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得去开下一个电话会议了。
expectedAnswers: Got it—good luck with the call!
No problem, I’ll catch you tomorrow!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并结束对话，不提出新请求
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词搭配和时态
表达自然度：是否使用了地道口语表达如 'talk to you', 'catch you'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'call', 'talk', 'catch you' 等相关词汇

content.speakerText: Well, I should get back to my tasks.
expectedAnswers: Same here—thanks for the quick chat!
Absolutely, I’ll let you get back to it!
Thanks for the update—I’ll ping you later if I need help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否以积极方式结束对话，不制造额外负担
语言准确性：语法正确，表达清晰
表达自然度：是否使用了自然的职场口语，如 'ping you', 'get back to it'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'tasks', 'chat', 'later', 'get back to' 等场景关键词
